info.name: DataMind — NLP-to-SQL Platform
info.description:
Enterprise AI Data Assistant API collection. Ask business questions in plain English and get SQL + results.

Base URL: http://localhost:8000

Start the server first:
  uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000

request.description: Check if the server and database are running correctly.
Demo query 1 — returns invoices with amount > 5,00,000 that are unpaid/overdue. Hits semantic cache (⚡ instant).

item.name: Ask — Top 10 Vendors by Payment Delays

request.description: Demo query 2 — returns vendors ranked by average delivery delay days.

item.name: Ask — Customers with Highest Outstanding Balance

request.description: Demo query 3 — returns customers sorted by outstanding balance with credit utilization %.
Demo query 4 — returns department-wise expense totals for current year.
Demo query 5 — returns products where stock_quantity < reorder_level, sorted by shortage.
Custom query — goes through full pipeline: intent → schema retrieval → graph JOIN discovery → Mistral SQL generation → validation → execution.
Chat intent demo — classified as CHAT (not DATA), gets a direct conversational reply without SQL pipeline.
Multi-turn conversation demo — uses same session_id as a previous query. The system remembers conversation history and applies it to refine the SQL.
Streaming endpoint — returns Server-Sent Events (SSE). Tokens stream in real-time from Mistral. Use browser or curl to see streaming.
Returns full conversation history for a session. Shows multi-turn capability.
Clears conversation history for a session.
Returns all 15 enterprise tables with domain, description, and column count.
Returns full schema for the invoices table — all columns, types, FK relationships.
ChromaDB vector search — finds the most relevant tables for a natural language query. Shows relevance scores.
Live monitoring dashboard — total queries, success rate, cache hit rate, avg latency, schema graph stats, recent queries.
